renderingProblem: Full pre-rendered bitmap-record payload for 24 true-axis orientations exceeded PRG budget.

payloadStrategy.name: endpoint/line-command payload for 3x3x10 pit
payloadStrategy.runtimeContract: C64 runtime looks up orientation transitions and draws prepared endpoint line commands.

summary.recommendation: Proceed to a true-axis endpoint 3x3 pit preview PRG using a small runtime line drawer if classification is PATCH or WATCH.

liPlusPlusMeaning: Workbench generates the 24-orientation graph and compact endpoint payload; the C64 executes table lookup and line drawing.
